note: MongoDB Atlas cluster tier ladder. M0 is the perpetual free shared tier; M2/M5 are low-cost shared tiers; M10+ are dedicated clusters billed hourly (monthlyUsd = hourly x 720h). Dedicated-tier monthlies vary by cloud/region; list values are representative. Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: M10 spec: 10 GB storage, 2 GB RAM, 2 vCPUs; cluster tier breakdown
Perpetual free tier (M0, 512 MB) and shared tiers from ~$9/mo
